content.speakerText: I got you something—hope you like it!
content.speakerTextCn: 我给你带了礼物，希望你喜欢！

options.text: Oh my gosh, you shouldn't have! It's perfect!
Is this really for me? I didn't expect anything.
It's nice, but I already have one.

content.explanation: 正确答案体现了收到礼物时的惊喜与礼貌感谢，符合英语文化中对赠礼的积极回应。选项2过于平淡，缺乏情感回应；选项3虽然礼貌但不够自然，且未表达对礼物的欣赏；选项4直接否定礼物价值，显得不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I picked this out especially for you because I know how much you love coffee.
content.speakerTextCn: 我特意为你挑了这个，因为我知道你有多爱咖啡。

options.text: Wow, this is so thoughtful! Thank you so much!
Oh, I don't drink coffee anymore.
You didn't have to spend money on me.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了对对方用心的感激，符合赠礼场景的积极回应。选项2直接否定礼物用途，伤感情；选项3虽看似礼貌，但可能让送礼者感到内疚；选项4语气冷淡，缺乏真诚。

content.speakerText: Happy birthday! I hope you enjoy this little gift.
content.speakerTextCn: 生日快乐！希望你喜欢这份小礼物。

options.text: This is too much! I'm so touched—thank you!
I'll put it on my shelf.
Do I have to open it now?
It's okay, I was hoping for something bigger.

content.explanation: 正确答案表达了真诚的感动与感谢，符合英语文化中对生日礼物的得体回应。选项2过于冷漠；选项3显得不耐烦；选项4直接表达不满，极不礼貌。
